title: Generated Faction
description: Raw, pre-validation output of `GenerationProvider.generateStructured` for kind='faction'. Before this becomes a loadable pack the pipeline: (1) validates against record schemas, (2) runs the coherence check, (3) runs the auto-balancer, (4) writes manifest and contentHash. Numeric caps (HP, ATK, abilities-per-unit) are not duplicated here — the single source of truth is `balance-constraints.schema.json`, consumed by both the orchestrator-side moderation step and any non-orchestrator producer (community editor, hand-edited pack).

notes.description: Generator-reported metadata (e.g. provider id, prompt hash, estimated power). Never load-bearing for gameplay. `notes.providerId` is best-effort metadata only; the authoritative version pin baked into the materialized pack is `manifest.generation` per `generation-config.schema.json`.
